description: WebexConfig configures notification via Cisco Webex See https://prometheus.io/docs/alerting/latest/configuration/#webex_config

apiURL.description: apiURL defines the Webex Teams API URL i.e. https://webexapis.com/v1/messages

httpConfig.description: httpConfig defines the HTTP client's configuration.

roomID.description: roomID defines the ID of the Webex Teams room where to send the messages.

sendResolved.description: sendResolved defines whether or not to notify about resolved alerts.
